engineering_worth_question.reason: Governance change touches the formal entry, current state, security scope, and Git closeout behavior.

human_gates: No market, channel, customer, compliance, business execution, repository visibility, PR, or branch merge decision is authorized.

pre_task_supply_pack_record.task_goal: Enable the single-repository and multi-branch governance rule on dami/main.

exact_relevant_snippets: Target repository is fthytwerwt-sudo/dami and target branch is main.
New codex/* branches must be created from origin/main.
Public repository safety applies to all branches.
Root AGENTS.md is the sole formal Codex entry.
Repository writes require route_decision and Git closeout.
Business execution, market, channel, B2B/B2C, and compliance states remain false.
No target country, market, channel, price, MOQ, delivery term, agency policy, or business model is formally approved.
Previous decisions did not yet record the single-repository and multi-branch governance decision.
Formal changes require precise staging, diff check, scans, commit, push, three-way readback, and remote file readback.
Any repository write, commit, or push requires a passing route_decision.
pre_task_supply_pack requires source_path, readback_status, and exact relevant snippets.
Every modified file must be listed in a per_file_plan.
The current repository root is the only formal workspace.

forbidden_actions: Create a new clone or worktree.
Merge or rewrite the existing tool branch.
Advance market, customer, compliance, or external business status.

required_output_inventory: Git commit, push, three-way SHA match, and remote readback

remaining_work_check.gpt_project_static_package_refresh: not regenerated in this governance-only round

shared_policy.missing_info_policy: Block if required repository, branch, source, or remote readback evidence is missing.
shared_policy.conflict_policy: Block on repository mismatch, branch mismatch, main divergence, policy conflict, unrelated changes, or sensitive data findings.
shared_policy.blocked_if: blocked_wrong_repository_or_branch, blocked_main_not_synchronized, repository_policy_conflict, blocked_repo_visibility_for_sensitive_data, blocked_unrelated_changes, git_closeout_repair, remote_readback_failed
shared_policy.user_review_points: This task activates repository governance only; it does not approve market, channel, product, compliance, customer outreach, PR creation, branch merge, or repository visibility changes.

paths: project_system/audit/20260722_唯一仓库与多分支治理_执行前方案_single_repository_branch_governance_per_file_plan.json
plan_groups.purpose: Write the single-repository and multi-branch governance rule into the formal entry and current records.
core_decisions: main stores formal rules, current records, approved stable code, and approved formal outputs
new codex/* branches start from origin/main
existing codex/dami-web-agent-toolkit branch is a historical exception only
branch isolation is not privacy isolation
trigger_conditions: repository write requested for main governance update
plan_groups.missing_info_policy: Block if any required source is missing or unreadable.
plan_groups.conflict_policy: Block if local main and origin/main diverge, if rules conflict, or if staged content contains secrets or sensitive data.
plan_groups.blocked_if: blocked_wrong_repository_or_branch, blocked_main_not_synchronized, repository_policy_conflict, blocked_repo_visibility_for_sensitive_data, blocked_unrelated_changes, git_closeout_repair, remote_readback_failed
examples: main effective requires local HEAD = origin/main = git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main.
codex/<task-slug> push is branch pushed, not main effective.
A true third-party Fork request routes to human_decision_required.
validation: remote readback for AGENTS.md and current files
plan_groups.user_review_points: Review only the repository governance rule and current metadata. Business, market, customer, compliance, PR, merge, and visibility decisions are excluded.
